forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,58 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- claude-code
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: d280
+title: Eliminate the ui.* command namespace — fold into app.* (no separate "ui" commands)
+---
+## What
+Decision (user): there should be **no `ui.*` command namespace**. Commands that manipulate the application's UI surface ARE app commands — the `ui.*` prefix is a needless second namespace that splits identical concerns across two plugins. Collapse `ui.*` into `app.*` (routing to the correct MCP server is orthogonal to the command id namespace).
+
+## Background
+Command namespaces today are split by source-YAML origin, not by domain. The `app-shell-commands` plugin owns `app.*`; the `ui-commands` plugin owns `ui.*`. They overlap on UI-surface toggles (e.g. `app.palette`/`app.command` vs `ui.palette.open` both route to the `ui_state` MCP server). See sibling card `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` (palette consolidation) — that is one symptom of this same split.
+
+## Current `ui.*` inventory (`builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts`)
+| Command | Backs onto (MCP server) | Proposed new id |
+|---|---|---|
+| `ui.inspect` | `ui_state` (Inspect) | `app.inspect` |
+| `ui.inspector.close` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.close` |
+| `ui.inspector.close_all` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.closeAll` |
+| `ui.inspector.set_width` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.setWidth` |
+| `ui.palette.open` | `ui_state` | (folds into the single palette command from the palette card) |
+| `ui.palette.close` | `ui_state` | `app.palette.close` / `app.dismiss` |
+| `ui.mode.set` | `ui_state` (SetKeymapMode) | `app.mode.set` (or `settings.keymap.*`) |
+| `ui.entity.startRename` | `ui_state` (StartRename) | `app.entity.startRename` (or `perspective.rename`) |
+| `ui.setFocus` | **`focus`** server | `app.setFocus` (or `nav.setFocus` / a `focus.*` id) — NOT ui_state |
+| `window.new` | `window` server | already correct (`window.*`) — just lives in the wrong plugin; move to a window/file plugin |
+
+Note: the id namespace is independent of which MCP server backs the command. `ui.setFocus` must keep routing to the `focus` server and `window.new` to the `window` server regardless of the rename.
+
+## Scope / approach
+- Rename the `ui.*` ids to `app.*` (per table; confirm final names) and fold the `ui-commands` plugin registrations into `app-shell-commands` (or distribute to the domain plugin that matches the backing server: focus → a focus plugin, window.new → file/window plugin).
+- Keep each command's backing MCP-server call unchanged — this is a namespace/registration move, not a behavior change.
+- Update all references: keybinding tables, `menu:` placements, context-menu wiring, scope-claim lookups, and the command-service e2e tests that assert the registered id set.
+
+## Blast radius (must update together)
+- `builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts` (+ its `context.ts`), `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/*`
+- Any frontend keymap / scope that references `ui.*` ids (e.g. `ui.inspect`, `ui.setFocus`, `ui.palette.open`)
+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` and `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` (assert the new id set)
+- Any Rust/registry references to the old ids (grep `ui\.` command ids repo-wide)
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] No command id begins with `ui.` — all former `ui.*` commands are `app.*` (or the correct domain prefix) and register from the consolidated plugin(s).
+- [ ] Each migrated command still routes to the same MCP server it did before (ui_state / focus / window) — verified, not assumed.
+- [ ] `window.new` and `ui.setFocus` route to `window` / `focus` respectively (not lumped under the ui_state/app shell by accident).
+- [ ] All keybindings, menu placements, and context-menu entries resolve under the new ids (no dangling `ui.*` reference).
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] Update `builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` / `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` to assert the renamed id set and that each routes to the expected server.
+- [ ] A guard test asserting NO registered command id starts with `ui.` (prevents regression).
+- [ ] Frontend keymap test: former `ui.*` shortcuts resolve under the new `app.*` ids.
+- [ ] Regression: tests fail before the rename, pass after.
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write the failing id-set / no-`ui.`-prefix guard test first, then migrate.
+
+## Related
+- Palette consolidation: `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` (the single palette command lands in `app.*` as part of this).
+- Deeper follow-up (NOT this card): dissolving the `ui_state` monolith and redistributing its state (window geometry → window service, active_view → views, drag → drag, etc.). Track separately if desired.
\ No newline at end of file
reverse_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,58 +0,0 @@
----
-assignees:
-- claude-code
-position_column: todo
-position_ordinal: d280
-title: Eliminate the ui.* command namespace — fold into app.* (no separate "ui" commands)
----
-## What
-Decision (user): there should be **no `ui.*` command namespace**. Commands that manipulate the application's UI surface ARE app commands — the `ui.*` prefix is a needless second namespace that splits identical concerns across two plugins. Collapse `ui.*` into `app.*` (routing to the correct MCP server is orthogonal to the command id namespace).
-
-## Background
-Command namespaces today are split by source-YAML origin, not by domain. The `app-shell-commands` plugin owns `app.*`; the `ui-commands` plugin owns `ui.*`. They overlap on UI-surface toggles (e.g. `app.palette`/`app.command` vs `ui.palette.open` both route to the `ui_state` MCP server). See sibling card `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` (palette consolidation) — that is one symptom of this same split.
-
-## Current `ui.*` inventory (`builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts`)
-| Command | Backs onto (MCP server) | Proposed new id |
-|---|---|---|
-| `ui.inspect` | `ui_state` (Inspect) | `app.inspect` |
-| `ui.inspector.close` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.close` |
-| `ui.inspector.close_all` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.closeAll` |
-| `ui.inspector.set_width` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.setWidth` |
-| `ui.palette.open` | `ui_state` | (folds into the single palette command from the palette card) |
-| `ui.palette.close` | `ui_state` | `app.palette.close` / `app.dismiss` |
-| `ui.mode.set` | `ui_state` (SetKeymapMode) | `app.mode.set` (or `settings.keymap.*`) |
-| `ui.entity.startRename` | `ui_state` (StartRename) | `app.entity.startRename` (or `perspective.rename`) |
-| `ui.setFocus` | **`focus`** server | `app.setFocus` (or `nav.setFocus` / a `focus.*` id) — NOT ui_state |
-| `window.new` | `window` server | already correct (`window.*`) — just lives in the wrong plugin; move to a window/file plugin |
-
-Note: the id namespace is independent of which MCP server backs the command. `ui.setFocus` must keep routing to the `focus` server and `window.new` to the `window` server regardless of the rename.
-
-## Scope / approach
-- Rename the `ui.*` ids to `app.*` (per table; confirm final names) and fold the `ui-commands` plugin registrations into `app-shell-commands` (or distribute to the domain plugin that matches the backing server: focus → a focus plugin, window.new → file/window plugin).
-- Keep each command's backing MCP-server call unchanged — this is a namespace/registration move, not a behavior change.
-- Update all references: keybinding tables, `menu:` placements, context-menu wiring, scope-claim lookups, and the command-service e2e tests that assert the registered id set.
-
-## Blast radius (must update together)
-- `builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts` (+ its `context.ts`), `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/*`
-- Any frontend keymap / scope that references `ui.*` ids (e.g. `ui.inspect`, `ui.setFocus`, `ui.palette.open`)
-- `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` and `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` (assert the new id set)
-- Any Rust/registry references to the old ids (grep `ui\.` command ids repo-wide)
-
-## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] No command id begins with `ui.` — all former `ui.*` commands are `app.*` (or the correct domain prefix) and register from the consolidated plugin(s).
-- [ ] Each migrated command still routes to the same MCP server it did before (ui_state / focus / window) — verified, not assumed.
-- [ ] `window.new` and `ui.setFocus` route to `window` / `focus` respectively (not lumped under the ui_state/app shell by accident).
-- [ ] All keybindings, menu placements, and context-menu entries resolve under the new ids (no dangling `ui.*` reference).
-
-## Tests
-- [ ] Update `builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` / `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` to assert the renamed id set and that each routes to the expected server.
-- [ ] A guard test asserting NO registered command id starts with `ui.` (prevents regression).
-- [ ] Frontend keymap test: former `ui.*` shortcuts resolve under the new `app.*` ids.
-- [ ] Regression: tests fail before the rename, pass after.
-
-## Workflow
-- Use `/tdd` — write the failing id-set / no-`ui.`-prefix guard test first, then migrate.
-
-## Related
-- Palette consolidation: `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` (the single palette command lands in `app.*` as part of this).
-- Deeper follow-up (NOT this card): dissolving the `ui_state` monolith and redistributing its state (window geometry → window service, active_view → views, drag → drag, etc.). Track separately if desired.
\ No newline at end of file

+title: Rename all ui.* commands to app.* — eliminate the "ui" command namespace
 ---
 ## What
-Decision (user): there should be **no `ui.*` command namespace**. Commands that manipulate the application's UI surface ARE app commands — the `ui.*` prefix is a needless second namespace that splits identical concerns across two plugins. Collapse `ui.*` into `app.*` (routing to the correct MCP server is orthogonal to the command id namespace).
+Decision (user): **there is no `ui.*` command namespace. Every former `ui.*` command is renamed to `app.*`.** UI-surface commands are app commands. The command-id namespace is independent of which MCP server backs the command — renaming the id does NOT change which server answers it.

-## Background
-Command namespaces today are split by source-YAML origin, not by domain. The `app-shell-commands` plugin owns `app.*`; the `ui-commands` plugin owns `ui.*`. They overlap on UI-surface toggles (e.g. `app.palette`/`app.command` vs `ui.palette.open` both route to the `ui_state` MCP server). See sibling card `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` (palette consolidation) — that is one symptom of this same split.
+## Rename map (uniform `app.*` — user: "all called app")
+From `builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts`:

-## Current `ui.*` inventory (`builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts`)
-| Command | Backs onto (MCP server) | Proposed new id |
+| Current id | New id | Backing MCP server (UNCHANGED) |
 |---|---|---|
-| `ui.inspect` | `ui_state` (Inspect) | `app.inspect` |
-| `ui.inspector.close` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.close` |
-| `ui.inspector.close_all` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.closeAll` |
-| `ui.inspector.set_width` | `ui_state` | `app.inspector.setWidth` |
-| `ui.palette.open` | `ui_state` | (folds into the single palette command from the palette card) |
-| `ui.palette.close` | `ui_state` | `app.palette.close` / `app.dismiss` |
-| `ui.mode.set` | `ui_state` (SetKeymapMode) | `app.mode.set` (or `settings.keymap.*`) |
-| `ui.entity.startRename` | `ui_state` (StartRename) | `app.entity.startRename` (or `perspective.rename`) |
-| `ui.setFocus` | **`focus`** server | `app.setFocus` (or `nav.setFocus` / a `focus.*` id) — NOT ui_state |
-| `window.new` | `window` server | already correct (`window.*`) — just lives in the wrong plugin; move to a window/file plugin |
+| `ui.inspect` | `app.inspect` | `ui_state` |
+| `ui.inspector.close` | `app.inspector.close` | `ui_state` |
+| `ui.inspector.close_all` | `app.inspector.close_all` | `ui_state` |
+| `ui.inspector.set_width` | `app.inspector.set_width` | `ui_state` |
+| `ui.palette.open` | `app.palette.open` (or the single survivor from the palette card) | `ui_state` |
+| `ui.palette.close` | `app.palette.close` | `ui_state` |
+| `ui.mode.set` | `app.mode.set` | `ui_state` |
+| `ui.entity.startRename` | `app.entity.startRename` | `ui_state` |
+| `ui.setFocus` | `app.setFocus` | **`focus`** (id changes to app.*, routing stays focus) |

-Note: the id namespace is independent of which MCP server backs the command. `ui.setFocus` must keep routing to the `focus` server and `window.new` to the `window` server regardless of the rename.
+`window.new` (also in this plugin) is NOT a `ui.*` command — it keeps `window.new` and its `window` server routing. Out of scope for the rename; only its plugin home may move.

-## Scope / approach
-- Rename the `ui.*` ids to `app.*` (per table; confirm final names) and fold the `ui-commands` plugin registrations into `app-shell-commands` (or distribute to the domain plugin that matches the backing server: focus → a focus plugin, window.new → file/window plugin).
-- Keep each command's backing MCP-server call unchanged — this is a namespace/registration move, not a behavior change.
-- Update all references: keybinding tables, `menu:` placements, context-menu wiring, scope-claim lookups, and the command-service e2e tests that assert the registered id set.
+## Approach
+- Rename every `ui.*` id to `app.*` and fold the `ui-commands` plugin registrations into `app-shell-commands` (single app-command plugin).
+- Each command keeps its existing MCP-server call verbatim — pure namespace/registration move, zero behavior change. `app.setFocus` still calls the `focus` server.
+- The single palette command from card `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` lands here as `app.*` too.

-## Blast radius (must update together)
-- `builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts` (+ its `context.ts`), `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/*`
-- Any frontend keymap / scope that references `ui.*` ids (e.g. `ui.inspect`, `ui.setFocus`, `ui.palette.open`)
-- `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` and `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` (assert the new id set)
-- Any Rust/registry references to the old ids (grep `ui\.` command ids repo-wide)

+- `builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts` (+ `context.ts`) → merged into `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/*`

+- `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` + `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs`
+- Repo-wide grep for the old ids (`ui\.inspect`, `ui\.inspector`, `ui\.palette`, `ui\.mode`, `ui\.entity`, `ui\.setFocus`)

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] No command id begins with `ui.` — all former `ui.*` commands are `app.*` (or the correct domain prefix) and register from the consolidated plugin(s).
-- [ ] Each migrated command still routes to the same MCP server it did before (ui_state / focus / window) — verified, not assumed.
-- [ ] `window.new` and `ui.setFocus` route to `window` / `focus` respectively (not lumped under the ui_state/app shell by accident).
-- [ ] All keybindings, menu placements, and context-menu entries resolve under the new ids (no dangling `ui.*` reference).
+- [ ] No registered command id begins with `ui.` — all are `app.*`.
+- [ ] Each renamed command routes to the SAME MCP server as before (verified): inspector/palette/mode/rename/inspect → `ui_state`; `app.setFocus` → `focus`.
+- [ ] All keybindings, menu placements, and context-menu entries resolve under the new `app.*` ids — no dangling `ui.*` reference anywhere.

 ## Tests
-- [ ] Update `builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` / `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` to assert the renamed id set and that each routes to the expected server.
-- [ ] A guard test asserting NO registered command id starts with `ui.` (prevents regression).
+- [ ] Update `builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` / `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs` to assert the renamed `app.*` id set and per-command server routing.
+- [ ] Guard test: assert NO registered command id starts with `ui.` (regression lock).
 - [ ] Frontend keymap test: former `ui.*` shortcuts resolve under the new `app.*` ids.
-- [ ] Regression: tests fail before the rename, pass after.
+- [ ] Tests fail before the rename, pass after.

 ## Workflow
-- Use `/tdd` — write the failing id-set / no-`ui.`-prefix guard test first, then migrate.
+- Use `/tdd` — write the no-`ui.`-prefix guard test first, then migrate.

 ## Related
-- Palette consolidation: `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` (the single palette command lands in `app.*` as part of this).
-- Deeper follow-up (NOT this card): dissolving the `ui_state` monolith and redistributing its state (window geometry → window service, active_view → views, drag → drag, etc.). Track separately if desired. #tech-debt
\ No newline at end of file
+- Palette consolidation `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` (single palette command becomes `app.*`).
\ No newline at end of file

forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -8,9 +8,15 @@
 ## What
 Decision (user): **there is no `ui.*` command namespace. Every former `ui.*` command is renamed to `app.*`.** UI-surface commands are app commands. The command-id namespace is independent of which MCP server backs the command — renaming the id does NOT change which server answers it.

+## IMPORTANT — fold into the ui-command-cleanup project (owner decision)
+The `ui-command-cleanup` project (Cards A,C,D,E,F,G,H) MOVES many of these commands into plugins. Per "fold rename into each move", those moves adopt the `app.*` name AT MOVE TIME — so the moved commands never carry a `ui.*` id. THIS card only mops up the `ui.*` ids that the cleanup project does NOT move. Before working this card, check what the cleanup has already renamed:
+- `app.palette.open` — done by Card A (01KTCQFH7AEQDZD0QETSMCMGP0).
+- `app.inspect` / `app.inspector.close` (+ close_all/set_width) — done by Card G (01KTED8MS8917AJCDAVHKSZHK7).
+- `app.entity.startRename` — done where that command is moved.
+- `app.ai-panel.*` editor drill-ins — done by Card E (01KTED7PFKRS6GMAQKVDCQA07V).
+This card = the remainder + the repo-wide guard test (no id starts with `ui.`).
+
 ## Rename map (uniform `app.*` — user: "all called app")
-From `builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts`:
-
 | Current id | New id | Backing MCP server (UNCHANGED) |
 |---|---|---|
 | `ui.inspect` | `app.inspect` | `ui_state` |
@@ -17,7 +23,7 @@
 | `ui.inspector.close` | `app.inspector.close` | `ui_state` |
 | `ui.inspector.close_all` | `app.inspector.close_all` | `ui_state` |
 | `ui.inspector.set_width` | `app.inspector.set_width` | `ui_state` |
-| `ui.palette.open` | `app.palette.open` (or the single survivor from the palette card) | `ui_state` |
+| `ui.palette.open` | `app.palette.open` | `ui_state` |
 | `ui.palette.close` | `app.palette.close` | `ui_state` |
 | `ui.mode.set` | `app.mode.set` | `ui_state` |
 | `ui.entity.startRename` | `app.entity.startRename` | `ui_state` |
@@ -26,19 +32,18 @@
 `window.new` (also in this plugin) is NOT a `ui.*` command — it keeps `window.new` and its `window` server routing. Out of scope for the rename; only its plugin home may move.

 ## Approach
-- Rename every `ui.*` id to `app.*` and fold the `ui-commands` plugin registrations into `app-shell-commands` (single app-command plugin).
+- Rename every remaining `ui.*` id to `app.*` and fold the `ui-commands` plugin registrations into `app-shell-commands` (single app-command plugin).
 - Each command keeps its existing MCP-server call verbatim — pure namespace/registration move, zero behavior change. `app.setFocus` still calls the `focus` server.
-- The single palette command from card `01KTCRQ6KJ67FJWYEZFQ6J7R13` lands here as `app.*` too.

 ## Blast radius (update together)
 - `builtin/plugins/ui-commands/index.ts` (+ `context.ts`) → merged into `builtin/plugins/app-shell-commands/*`
-- Frontend keymap / scope references to `ui.*` ids (`ui.inspect`, `ui.setFocus`, `ui.palette.open`, `ui.mode.set`, …) in `apps/kanban-app/ui/src` (keybindings, scope-claim lookups, menu/context-menu wiring)
+- Frontend keymap / scope references to `ui.*` ids in `apps/kanban-app/ui/src` (keybindings, scope-claim lookups, menu/context-menu wiring)
 - `crates/swissarmyhammer-command-service/tests/integration/builtin_ui_commands_e2e.rs` + `builtin_app_shell_commands_e2e.rs`
-- Repo-wide grep for the old ids (`ui\.inspect`, `ui\.inspector`, `ui\.palette`, `ui\.mode`, `ui\.entity`, `ui\.setFocus`)
+- Repo-wide grep for old ids (`ui\.inspect`, `ui\.inspector`, `ui\.palette`, `ui\.mode`, `ui\.entity`, `ui\.setFocus`)

 ## Acceptance Criteria
 - [ ] No registered command id begins with `ui.` — all are `app.*`.
-- [ ] Each renamed command routes to the SAME MCP server as before (verified): inspector/palette/mode/rename/inspect → `ui_state`; `app.setFocus` → `focus`.
+- [ ] Each renamed command routes to the SAME MCP server as before: inspector/palette/mode/rename/inspect → `ui_state`; `app.setFocus` → `focus`.
 - [ ] All keybindings, menu placements, and context-menu entries resolve under the new `app.*` ids — no dangling `ui.*` reference anywhere.

 ## Tests
@@ -51,4 +56,4 @@

 ## Related
